name: ssotme-proxy
purpose: Substrate transpiler HTTP server. Started before backend so build endpoints work immediately.

name: admin-portal-backend
purpose: Express API + static frontend host. Owns the write-through invariant.

name: admin-portal-frontend-dev
purpose: Vite dev server in dev mode. In production mode the backend serves built static files from port 7777.

name: postgres
command: docker compose up -d postgres (or system pg)
purpose: Editor database. Auto-init on first portal boot via flow-005.
